message:
style: apply rustfmt and fix minor lint warnings across crates

Formatter-only changes (no logic modifications):
- Reflow long lines in btree/overflow, harness, mvcc, compat modules
- Remove extra blank lines (cache_aligned.rs)
- Hoist common sort() call before branch in parser/semantic.rs
- Consistent trailing-whitespace cleanup in compat_persist.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
